creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
On Sunday 17 Aug 2008 8:00:50 am you wrote:

[snip]

> Would you remove "-msse -msse2 -msse3 -mmmx -march=nocona -march=nocona-g"
> from your CFLAGS and try again? I confirmed that this setting causes build
> error.

Following is an excerpt from the build output.

Following is my /etc/make.conf

----8<----8<----
CPUTYPE?=nocona
CFLAGS= -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -msse -msse2 -msse3 -mmmx -march=nocona
MAKEOPTS=-j3
WITH_IPV6=true
WITH_PYTHON=true
WITH_XCB=true
WITH_GCRYPT=true
WITH_PERL=true
WITHOUT_SOCKS=true
WITH_GTK2=true
WITH_TOC2MP3=true
WITH_THREADS=true
WITH_XVID=true
WITH_OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS=true
WITH_LAME=true
WITH_FAAC=true
WITH_GSM=true
WITH_AMR_NB=true
WITH_AMR_WB=true
WITH_SDL=true
WITH_DEBUG=yes
PORTSNAP_UPDATE=1
DOC_LANG=en_US.ISO8859-1
MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE=http://jaist.dl.sourceforge.net/sourceforge/%SUBDIR%/
MASTER_SITE_GNOME=http://ftp.nara.wide.ad.jp/pub/X11/GNOME/%SUBDIR%/
MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN=http://ftp.yz.yamagata-u.ac.jp/pub/lang/cpan/modules/by-module/%SUBDIR%/
# added by use.perl 2008-06-07 05:12:48
PERL_VER=5.8.8
PERL_VERSION=5.8.8
SUPFLAGS=       -z -g -L 2
SUPHOST=        cvsup.kr.FreeBSD.org
SUPFILE=        /usr/share/examples/cvsup/standard-supfile
SUP_UPDATE=1
KERNCONF=ULE
# Begin portconf settings
# Do not touch these lines
.if !empty(.CURDIR:M/usr/ports*) && exists(/usr/local/libexec/portconf)
_PORTCONF!=/usr/local/libexec/portconf
.for i in ${_PORTCONF:S/|/ /g}
${i:S/%/ /g}
.endfor
.endif
# End portconf settings

.if ${.CURDIR}==/usr/ports/multimedia/libxine
CFLAGS= -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe
WITH_DEBUG=
CPUTYPE=
DEBUG_FLAGS=
.endif
---->8---->8----

Thanks
Ashish Shukla
